install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

python -c "import ctypes, glob; path=glob.glob('/opt/conda/lib/python*/site-packages/nvidia/nccl/lib/libnccl.so.2')[0]; v=ctypes.c_int(); ctypes.CDLL(path).ncclGetVersion(ctypes.byref(v)); assert v.value == 22105, f'Expected NCCL 2.21.5 but got {v.value}'"
local_install_cmds: python -c "import ctypes; v=ctypes.c_int(); ctypes.CDLL('libnccl.so.2').ncclGetVersion(ctypes.byref(v)); assert v.value == 22105, f'Expected NCCL 2.21.5 but got {v.value}'"

mkdir -p {data_root}/tiktoken_cache && TIKTOKEN_CACHE_DIR={data_root}/tiktoken_cache python -c "import sys, tiktoken; exec("try:
 tiktoken.get_encoding('gpt2')
 print('tiktoken cache ready')
except Exception as exc:
 print(f'tiktoken cache warm skipped: {exc}', file=sys.stderr)")"

data_deps.name: lm-eval-datasets
data_deps.description: Pre-downloaded HF datasets for lm-eval (hellaswag, arc, piqa, winogrande, ~200MB)
